"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const RouterClient = require("./RouterClient.cjs"); const client = require("@tanstack/router-core/ssr/client"); exports.RouterClient = RouterClient.RouterClient; Object.keys(client).forEach((k) => { if (k !== "default" && !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(exports, k)) Object.defineProperty(exports, k, { enumerable: true, get: () => client[k] }); }); //# sourceMappingURL=client.cjs.map
